sentences.target: Mein Bruder ist Künstler in der Stadt.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈbʁuːdɐ ɪst ˈkʏnstlɐ ɪn deːɐ̯ ʃtat/

translations.de: Mein Bruder ist Künstler in der Stadt.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈbʁuːdɐ ɪst ˈkʏnstlɐ ɪn deːɐ̯ ʃtat/
translations.en: My brother is an artist in the city.
translations.es: Mi hermano es artista en la ciudad.
translations.fr: Mon frère est artiste en ville.
translations.it: Mio fratello è un artista in città.
translations.zh-Hans: 我哥哥在城里当艺术家。
translations.yue: 我哥喺城市度做藝術家。
translations.ru: Мой брат работает художником в городе.
translations.pt: Meu irmão é artista na cidade.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi là nghệ sĩ ở thành phố.
translations.nl: Mijn broer is kunstenaar in de stad.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई शहर में कलाकार है.
translations.pl: Mój brat jest artystą w mieście.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου είναι καλλιτέχνης στην πόλη.
translations.nb: Broren min er kunstner i byen.
translations.id: Kakak laki-laki saya adalah seniman di kota.
translations.sv: Min bror är konstnär i stan.
translations.ro: Fratele meu este artist în oraș.
translations.cs: Můj bratr je umělec ve městě.
translations.da: Min bror er kunstner i byen.
translations.ja: 兄は街で芸術家をしている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Bruder'; nominative masculine singular; marks possession.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula); 3rd person singular present; links subject to predicate nominal.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; predicate complement after the copula.
Two-way preposition; here with dative for static location; heads the PP 'in der Stadt'.
Definite article; feminine dative singular; determiner for 'Stadt' governed by 'in'.
Common noun; feminine; dative singular; object of the preposition 'in' indicating location.

sentences.target: Der Künstler malt heute auf dem Markt.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈkʏnstlɐ malt ˈhɔʏ̯tə aʊ̯f deːm maʁkt/

translations.de: Der Künstler malt heute auf dem Markt.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈkʏnstlɐ malt ˈhɔʏ̯tə aʊ̯f deːm maʁkt/
translations.en: The artist is painting at the market today.
translations.es: El artista está pintando hoy en el mercado.
translations.ko: 그 예술가는 오늘 시장에서 그림을 그리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 那位艺术家今天在市场上作画。
translations.yue: 嗰位藝術家今日喺市場度畫畫。
translations.pt: O artista está pintando hoje no mercado.
translations.vi: Hôm nay người họa sĩ đang vẽ ở chợ.
translations.nl: De kunstenaar schildert vandaag op de markt.
translations.hu: A művész ma a piacon fest.
translations.hi: कलाकार आज बाज़ार में चित्र बना रहा है.
translations.el: Ο καλλιτέχνης σήμερα ζωγραφίζει στην αγορά.
translations.nb: Kunstneren maler på markedet i dag.
translations.id: Seniman itu hari ini sedang melukis di pasar.
translations.sv: Konstnären målar på marknaden i dag.
translations.da: Kunstneren maler på markedet i dag.
translations.ja: その芸術家は今日市場で絵を描いている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; masculine nominative singular; marks the subject NP.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; action performed by the subject.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates time.
Two-way preposition; here with dative for location; introduces PP 'auf dem Markt'.
Definite article; masculine dative singular; determiner for 'Markt' governed by 'auf'.
Common noun; masculine; dative singular; object of the preposition 'auf'; locative PP.

sentences.target: Ich frage den Künstler nach einem Porträt.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn ˈkʏnstlɐ naːx ˈaɪ̯nəm pɔʁˈtʁɛː/

translations.de: Ich frage den Künstler nach einem Porträt.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfʁaːɡə deːn ˈkʏnstlɐ naːx ˈaɪ̯nəm pɔʁˈtʁɛː/
translations.en: I ask the artist for a portrait.
translations.es: Le pido al artista un retrato.
translations.fr: Je demande un portrait à l'artiste.
translations.zh-Hans: 我请那位艺术家给我画一幅肖像。
translations.yue: 我請嗰位藝術家幫我畫幅人像。
translations.vi: Tôi nhờ người họa sĩ vẽ cho tôi một bức chân dung.
translations.nl: Ik vraag de kunstenaar om een portret.
translations.hi: मैं कलाकार से एक चित्र बनाने को कहता हूँ.
translations.el: Ζητάω από τον καλλιτέχνη ένα πορτρέτο.
translations.nb: Jeg ber kunstneren om et portrett.
translations.id: Saya meminta seniman itu membuat potret.
translations.sv: Jag ber konstnären om ett porträtt.
translations.da: Jeg beder kunstneren om et portræt.
translations.ja: その芸術家に似顔絵を頼む。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular; nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 1st person singular present; takes a direct object and a PP complement.
Definite article; masculine accusative singular; determiner for 'Künstler' as direct object.
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; direct object (the person being asked).
Preposition selecting dative; complements 'fragen' to indicate the thing requested.
Indefinite article; dative singular; determiner for 'Porträt' governed by 'nach'.
Common noun; neuter; dative singular; object of the preposition 'nach' (requested item).

sentences.target: Im Park zeichnet ein Künstler Kinder.

translations.de: Im Park zeichnet ein Künstler Kinder.
translations.en: In the park, an artist draws children.
translations.es: En el parque un artista dibuja a unos niños.
translations.fr: Dans le parc, un artiste dessine des enfants.
translations.it: Al parco un artista disegna dei bambini.
translations.ko: 공원에서 한 예술가가 아이들을 그리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 在公园里，一位艺术家在画孩子们。
translations.yue: 喺公園有位藝術家喺度畫啲小朋友。
translations.pt: No parque, um artista desenha crianças.
translations.vi: Trong công viên, một nghệ sĩ đang vẽ bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: In het park tekent een kunstenaar kinderen.
translations.hu: A parkban egy művész gyerekeket rajzol.
translations.hi: पार्क में एक कलाकार बच्चों का चित्र बना रहा है.
translations.el: Στο πάρκο ένας καλλιτέχνης σχεδιάζει παιδιά.
translations.nb: I parken tegner en kunstner barn.
translations.id: Di taman, seorang seniman menggambar anak-anak.
translations.sv: I parken ritar en konstnär barn.
translations.ro: În parc, un artist desenează copii.
translations.da: I parken tegner en kunstner børn.
translations.ja: 公園で芸術家が子どもたちを描いている。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; two-way preposition used here for static location; selects dative.
Common noun; masculine; dative singular; object of the preposition 'im'; locative PP.
Main verb; 3rd person singular present; action performed in the indicated location.
Indefinite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner for the subject 'Künstler'.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Common noun; plural; accusative; direct object of 'zeichnet'.
